TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Paicu Yata'uyungana == Paicu Yata'uyungana (1932 miheca 4 folad 8 romi'ad – 2016 miheca 2 folad 20 romi'ad), (Dipong: 矢多喜久子／やた きくこ Yata Kikuko ), Cuo finacadan ngangan Paicu Yata'uyungana, kowaping ngangan Kao cihua, sifay nganga Painana, maradiway, singsi. Kaemangan miheca O mama ni Paicu Yata'uyungana o Cuo finacadan ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen), kaDipongan to'ek malaimengay ato malasingsiay, nai Cpu'u niyaro', malinah tayra i Tapang niyaro', pahicera i Keyupana niyaro', nanoya itini to masofoc ci Paicu Yata'uyungana , o sakakaay wawa ni 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen). Pakayraan no ngangan Dipong ci 矢多喜久子 a "喜久", no Dipong ato kowaping a "菊" malecaday ko ngiha, ono kowaping onini a "菊花" ko sakaira no pipangangan . Tadamaan to sakikiwiko ko mama ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana, saka kakawaen papitilid i Taynan kawteng pitilidan, kalaloodan itiya malinah tayra i Alisan kokumin kakko. Ikor itira cingra i Tayciw focukakko, i 228 demak itiya, mikihatiya cingra to 27 sofitay i Tayciw focukakko a "midipotay to nikapolongan", miliyas tayra i Poli. Nika o pilalang no kakeridan no 27 sofitay ci Zhong Yiren, ci Paicu Yata'uyungana ato 2 kapot mitilid a fafahiyan miliyas to Poli a minokay . Kohecalay katalawan Misawad ci Paicu Yata'uyungana nai focukakko i, itira i Ciyai, Alisan pitilidan a malasingsi. I 1952 miheca masawad cingra to kalasingsi, o mamisafaloco' to saka tayraaw i Colombia daykako no Amilika, nika malekapot ko mama ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana to kohecalay katalawan a demak a marepet, patayan. Karepet ni 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana palimo'ot a tilid ci Paicu Yata'uyunganaan to pidipot to laloma'an saka, sawad sato cingra to sakatayra i Amilika mitilid, tayra to cingra i karomadiwan ci Pai Nana han ko pangangan mitodong to sakilaloma'an, misafaloco' sapa'orip to mama . O radiw no Lating ko sakatadamaan ningra, nika honihoni makilim no imeng a misolap, malicay, saka eca to pasadak to likodo, ano eca sakatatelekaw to likodo a tiyam. Ikor no kapatay ni 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana i, matira to ko pikilim no imeng a micalap, mararid malicay, sakasasowal, pakokoten cingra mikapotay to Kongcantang han i 228 demakan. Itiya sa i "sakanga'ay mihayda" t osifo ato calemcem to sakalattih a makowang mapatangic malapadamsoay to roma kitakit a tapang pa'alipay patado . Mato'as to ko safa to fa'inayan fafahiyan miisal to sakilaloma'an, 35 ko mihecaan ni Paicu Yata'uyunganaan itiya to misawad romadiway ko tayal, itira sa i Taypi mipatiyam . Ipipatiyam mananam to lafang ci Shi Bingyan, masasiolah cangra, ikor mararamod to . I 1971 miheca, citodongay misolapay micowat to Jingshan cuanan, masolot iho ci Paicu Yata'uyungana mapatatalaw mihayda to nano nikapotay itiya to "Penglai mincu jiefang tongmenghui", maala ko pihayda a paya o aeca to ka solapen . Kato'asan kalitengan miheca Ikor no kapatay no fa'inay ci Shi Bingyan i, keriden ningra ko wawa nai Taypi minokay tayra i Tapang niyaro'. O mapodetay mili'epahay ci Paicu Yata'uyungana, miliyas to karomadiwan malingaday ko tayal, halafin no fala'an adada, ikor itira i niyaro' no mama a miliyas to hekal a mapatay . Piharatengan I 2013 miheca, mitomadaway no Dipong ci Sakai Mitsuko misanga'ay to rayray "Kacingangan no Taywan" (Dipong: 台湾アイデンティティー), aenemay tamdaw pakayni i saka 2 lalood ano eca kohecalay katalawan a mafalicay Taywan a tamdaw, ci Paicu Yata'uyungana ko cecay dengan fafahiyan milicayan . Mitomadaway to Yehuoleji ci Shon Rushian mananam ci Paicu Yata'uyunganaan itiya i, misatatas to 10 mihecaan no Yehuoleji to piterek, misyasing ci Paicu Yata'uyunganaan, itiya to i 2020 miheca mipasadak paika . I 2015 miheca, maradiway no 'Amis ci 'Ilid Kawlo pakici Paicu Yata'uyunganaan misanga' to radiw "Fangcalay fafahiyan" cecay radiw ; ikor to ningra to 10 miheca malekapot to maradiway no Piwma finacadan ci Chen Yonglong itira i Takang miradiw i, onini a radiw "Fangcalay fafahiyan" ato adihayay Dipong a radiw pasici Paicu Yata'uyunganaan todong a mita'ong . I 2023 miheca 228 piharatengan romi'ad, Shanling yuetuan pasadak "Huguoshan" a radiw, miharateng ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen) aci Paicu Yata'uyunganaan, o laloma' no niradiwan saheto piceli' mitahidang ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen) laloma'an . Laloma'an Mamo'etep malikaka ca Paicu Yata'uyungana, o cecay kaemangan mapesi' to. Ikor no karepet ni 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen), cifocod to wawa cingra ato Amilika kakeridan sofitay, pakaci Gao Yinghan, salongan i 20 miheca i matolo' a mapatay. Ikor ciwawa to fafahiyan nano Dipng a wawa, padoedo mararamod ci Shi Bingyan, ira ko 2 fa'inayan ato 1 fafahiyan a wawa. O cecay wawa ni Shi Bingyan matolo' a mapatay .
S.PHON: == paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana == paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), (ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ: ******** *** jata kiko~u~uko~u ), ʦo~u~uo~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ŋaŋan paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana, ko~uwapiŋ ŋaŋan kao~u ʦiħo~u~ua, sifaj ŋaŋa painana, maraɬ~ɮiwaj, siŋsi. kaəmaŋan miħəʦa o~u mama ni paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana o~u ʦo~u~uo~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən), kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan to~uʡək maɾaiməŋaj ato~u maɾasiŋsiaj, nai ʦpo~u~uʡo~u~u nijaro~uʡ, maɾinaħ tajra i tapaŋ nijaro~uʡ, paħiʦəra i kəjo~u~upana nijaro~uʡ, nano~uja itini to~u maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana , o~u sakakaaj wawa ni ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən). pakajraan no~u ŋaŋan ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ***** a "**", no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ko~uwapiŋ a "*" maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u ŋiħa, o~uno~u ko~uwapiŋ o~unini a "**" ko~u sakaira no~u pipaŋaŋan . taɬ~ɮamaan to~u sakikiwiko~u ko~u mama ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana, saka kakawaən papitiɾiɬ~ɮ i tajnan kawtəŋ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan itija maɾinaħ tajra i aɾisan ko~uko~u~umin kakko~u. iko~ur itira ʦiŋra i tajʦiw fo~uʦo~u~ukakko~u, i *** ɬ~ɮəmak itija, mikiħatija ʦiŋra to~u ** so~ufitaj i tajʦiw fo~uʦo~u~ukakko~u a "miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan", miɾijas tajra i po~uɾi. nika o~u piɾaɾaŋ no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ** so~ufitaj ʦi *ħo~uŋ jirən, ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana ato~u * kapo~ut mitiɾiɬ~ɮ a fafaħijan miɾijas to~u po~uɾi a mino~ukaj . ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan misawaɬ~ɮ ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana nai fo~uʦo~u~ukakko~u i, itira i ʦijai, aɾisan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a maɾasiŋsi. i **** miħəʦa masawaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra to~u kaɾasiŋsi, o~u mamisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u saka tajraaw i ʦo~uɾo~umb~b~via ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u amiɾika, nika maɾəkapo~ut ko~u mama ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana to~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a ɬ~ɮəmak a marəpət, patajan. karəpət ni ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana paɾimo~uʡo~ut a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan saka, sawaɬ~ɮ sato~u ʦiŋra to~u sakatajra i amiɾika mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, tajra to~u ʦiŋra i karo~umaɬ~ɮiwan ʦi pai nana ħan ko~u paŋaŋan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sakiɾaɾo~umaʡan, misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sapaʡo~urip to~u mama . o~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u ɾatiŋ ko~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan niŋra, nika ħo~uniħo~uni makiɾim no~u iməŋ a miso~uɾap, maɾiʦaj, saka əʦa to~u pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ɾiko~uɬ~ɮo~u, ano~u əʦa sakatatəɾəkaw to~u ɾiko~uɬ~ɮo~u a tijam. iko~ur no~u kapataj ni ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana i, matira to~u ko~u pikiɾim no~u iməŋ a miʦaɾap, marariɬ~ɮ maɾiʦaj, sakasaso~uwaɾ, pako~uko~utən ʦiŋra mikapo~utaj to~u ko~uŋʦantaŋ ħan i *** ɬ~ɮəmakan. itija sa i "sakaŋaʡaj miħajɬ~ɮa" t o~usifo~u ato~u ʦaɾəmʦəm to~u sakaɾattiħ a mako~uwaŋ mapataŋiʦ maɾapaɬ~ɮamso~uaj to~u ro~uma kitakit a tapaŋ paʡaɾipaj pataɬ~ɮo~u . mato~uʡas to~u ko~u safa to~u faʡinajan fafaħijan miisaɾ to~u sakiɾaɾo~umaʡan, ** ko~u miħəʦaan ni paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan itija to~u misawaɬ~ɮ ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ko~u tajaɾ, itira sa i tajpi mipatijam . ipipatijam mananam to~u ɾafaŋ ʦi sħi b~b~viŋjan, masasio~uɾaħ ʦaŋra, iko~ur mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u . i **** miħəʦa, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miso~uɾapaj miʦo~uwat to~u *iŋsħan ʦo~u~uanan, maso~uɾo~ut iħo~u ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana mapatataɾaw miħajɬ~ɮa to~u nano~u nikapo~utaj itija to~u "pəŋɾai minʦo~u~u jiəfaŋ to~uŋməŋħo~u~ui", maaɾa ko~u piħajɬ~ɮa a paja o~u aəʦa to~u ka so~uɾapən . kato~uʡasan kaɾitəŋan miħəʦa iko~ur no~u kapataj no~u faʡinaj ʦi sħi b~b~viŋjan i, kəriɬ~ɮən niŋra ko~u wawa nai tajpi mino~ukaj tajra i tapaŋ nijaro~uʡ. o~u mapo~uɬ~ɮətaj miɾiʡəpaħaj ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana, miɾijas to~u karo~umaɬ~ɮiwan maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj ko~u tajaɾ, ħaɾafin no~u faɾaʡan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, iko~ur itira i nijaro~uʡ no~u mama a miɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ a mapataj . piħaratəŋan i **** miħəʦa, mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi sakai mitso~u~uko~u misaŋaʡaj to~u rajraj "kaʦiŋaŋan no~u tajwan" (ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ: ***********), aənəmaj tamɬ~ɮaw pakajni i saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ano~u əʦa ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a mafaɾiʦaj tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana ko~u ʦəʦaj ɬ~ɮəŋan fafaħijan miɾiʦajan . mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj to~u jəħo~u~uo~uɾəji ʦi sħo~un ro~u~usħian mananam ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan itija i, misatatas to~u ** miħəʦaan no~u jəħo~u~uo~uɾəji to~u pitərək, misjasiŋ ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan, itija to~u i **** miħəʦa mipasaɬ~ɮak paika . i **** miħəʦa, maraɬ~ɮiwaj no~u ʡamis ʦi ʡiɾiɬ~ɮ kawɾo~u pakiʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw "faŋʦaɾaj fafaħijan" ʦəʦaj raɬ~ɮiw ; iko~ur to~u niŋra to~u ** miħəʦa maɾəkapo~ut to~u maraɬ~ɮiwaj no~u piwma finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħən jo~uŋɾo~uŋ itira i takaŋ miraɬ~ɮiw i, o~unini a raɬ~ɮiw "faŋʦaɾaj fafaħijan" ato~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a raɬ~ɮiw pasiʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a mitaʡo~uŋ . i **** miħəʦa *** piħaratəŋan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, sħanɾiŋ jo~u~uəto~u~uan pasaɬ~ɮak "ħo~u~u*o~u~uo~usħan" a raɬ~ɮiw, miħaratəŋ ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən) aʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan, o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u niraɬ~ɮiwan saħəto~u piʦəɾiʡ mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən) ɾaɾo~umaʡan . ɾaɾo~umaʡan mamo~uʡətəp maɾikaka ʦa paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana, o~u ʦəʦaj kaəmaŋan mapəsiʡ to~u. iko~ur no~u karəpət ni ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən), ʦifo~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u wawa ʦiŋra ato~u amiɾika kakəriɬ~ɮan so~ufitaj, pakaʦi *ao~u jiŋħan, saɾo~uŋan i ** miħəʦa i mato~uɾo~uʡ a mapataj. iko~ur ʦiwawa to~u fafaħijan nano~u ɬ~ɮipŋ a wawa, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi sħi b~b~viŋjan, ira ko~u * faʡinajan ato~u * fafaħijan a wawa. o~u ʦəʦaj wawa ni sħi b~b~viŋjan mato~uɾo~uʡ a mapataj .
S.FORM: == Paicu Yata'uyungana == Paicu Yata'uyungana (1932 miheca 4 folad 8 romi'ad – 2016 miheca 2 folad 20 romi'ad), (Dipong: 矢多喜久子／やた きくこ Yata Kikuko ), Cuo finacadan ngangan Paicu Yata'uyungana, kowaping ngangan Kao cihua, sifay nganga Painana, maradiway, singsi. Kaemangan miheca O mama ni Paicu Yata'uyungana o Cuo finacadan ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen), kaDipongan to'ek malaimengay ato malasingsiay, nai Cpu'u niyaro', malinah tayra i Tapang niyaro', pahicera i Keyupana niyaro', nanoya itini to masofoc ci Paicu Yata'uyungana , o sakakaay wawa ni 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen). Pakayraan no ngangan Dipong ci 矢多喜久子 a "喜久", no Dipong ato kowaping a "菊" malecaday ko ngiha, ono kowaping onini a "菊花" ko sakaira no pipangangan . Tadamaan to sakikiwiko ko mama ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana, saka kakawaen papitilid i Taynan kawteng pitilidan, kalaloodan itiya malinah tayra i Alisan kokumin kakko. Ikor itira cingra i Tayciw focukakko, i 228 demak itiya, mikihatiya cingra to 27 sofitay i Tayciw focukakko a "midipotay to nikapolongan", miliyas tayra i Poli. Nika o pilalang no kakeridan no 27 sofitay ci Zhong Yiren, ci Paicu Yata'uyungana ato 2 kapot mitilid a fafahiyan miliyas to Poli a minokay . Kohecalay katalawan Misawad ci Paicu Yata'uyungana nai focukakko i, itira i Ciyai, Alisan pitilidan a malasingsi. I 1952 miheca masawad cingra to kalasingsi, o mamisafaloco' to saka tayraaw i Colombia daykako no Amilika, nika malekapot ko mama ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana to kohecalay katalawan a demak a marepet, patayan. Karepet ni 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana palimo'ot a tilid ci Paicu Yata'uyunganaan to pidipot to laloma'an saka, sawad sato cingra to sakatayra i Amilika mitilid, tayra to cingra i karomadiwan ci Pai Nana han ko pangangan mitodong to sakilaloma'an, misafaloco' sapa'orip to mama . O radiw no Lating ko sakatadamaan ningra, nika honihoni makilim no imeng a misolap, malicay, saka eca to pasadak to likodo, ano eca sakatatelekaw to likodo a tiyam. Ikor no kapatay ni 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana i, matira to ko pikilim no imeng a micalap, mararid malicay, sakasasowal, pakokoten cingra mikapotay to Kongcantang han i 228 demakan. Itiya sa i "sakanga'ay mihayda" t osifo ato calemcem to sakalattih a makowang mapatangic malapadamsoay to roma kitakit a tapang pa'alipay patado . Mato'as to ko safa to fa'inayan fafahiyan miisal to sakilaloma'an, 35 ko mihecaan ni Paicu Yata'uyunganaan itiya to misawad romadiway ko tayal, itira sa i Taypi mipatiyam . Ipipatiyam mananam to lafang ci Shi Bingyan, masasiolah cangra, ikor mararamod to . I 1971 miheca, citodongay misolapay micowat to Jingshan cuanan, masolot iho ci Paicu Yata'uyungana mapatatalaw mihayda to nano nikapotay itiya to "Penglai mincu jiefang tongmenghui", maala ko pihayda a paya o aeca to ka solapen . Kato'asan kalitengan miheca Ikor no kapatay no fa'inay ci Shi Bingyan i, keriden ningra ko wawa nai Taypi minokay tayra i Tapang niyaro'. O mapodetay mili'epahay ci Paicu Yata'uyungana, miliyas to karomadiwan malingaday ko tayal, halafin no fala'an adada, ikor itira i niyaro' no mama a miliyas to hekal a mapatay . Piharatengan I 2013 miheca, mitomadaway no Dipong ci Sakai Mitsuko misanga'ay to rayray "Kacingangan no Taywan" (Dipong: 台湾アイデンティティー), aenemay tamdaw pakayni i saka 2 lalood ano eca kohecalay katalawan a mafalicay Taywan a tamdaw, ci Paicu Yata'uyungana ko cecay dengan fafahiyan milicayan . Mitomadaway to Yehuoleji ci Shon Rushian mananam ci Paicu Yata'uyunganaan itiya i, misatatas to 10 mihecaan no Yehuoleji to piterek, misyasing ci Paicu Yata'uyunganaan, itiya to i 2020 miheca mipasadak paika . I 2015 miheca, maradiway no 'Amis ci 'Ilid Kawlo pakici Paicu Yata'uyunganaan misanga' to radiw "Fangcalay fafahiyan" cecay radiw ; ikor to ningra to 10 miheca malekapot to maradiway no Piwma finacadan ci Chen Yonglong itira i Takang miradiw i, onini a radiw "Fangcalay fafahiyan" ato adihayay Dipong a radiw pasici Paicu Yata'uyunganaan todong a mita'ong . I 2023 miheca 228 piharatengan romi'ad, Shanling yuetuan pasadak "Huguoshan" a radiw, miharateng ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen) aci Paicu Yata'uyunganaan, o laloma' no niradiwan saheto piceli' mitahidang ci 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen) laloma'an . Laloma'an Mamo'etep malikaka ca Paicu Yata'uyungana, o cecay kaemangan mapesi' to. Ikor no karepet ni 'Uongʉ'e Yata'uyungana (Kao Yisen), cifocod to wawa cingra ato Amilika kakeridan sofitay, pakaci Gao Yinghan, salongan i 20 miheca i matolo' a mapatay. Ikor ciwawa to fafahiyan nano Dipng a wawa, padoedo mararamod ci Shi Bingyan, ira ko 2 fa'inayan ato 1 fafahiyan a wawa. O cecay wawa ni Shi Bingyan matolo' a mapatay .
S.PHON: == paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana == paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), (ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ: ******** *** jata kiko~u~uko~u ), ʦo~u~uo~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ŋaŋan paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana, ko~uwapiŋ ŋaŋan kao~u ʦiħo~u~ua, sifaj ŋaŋa painana, maraɬ~ɮiwaj, siŋsi. kaəmaŋan miħəʦa o~u mama ni paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana o~u ʦo~u~uo~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən), kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan to~uʡək maɾaiməŋaj ato~u maɾasiŋsiaj, nai ʦpo~u~uʡo~u~u nijaro~uʡ, maɾinaħ tajra i tapaŋ nijaro~uʡ, paħiʦəra i kəjo~u~upana nijaro~uʡ, nano~uja itini to~u maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana , o~u sakakaaj wawa ni ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən). pakajraan no~u ŋaŋan ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ***** a "**", no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ato~u ko~uwapiŋ a "*" maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u ŋiħa, o~uno~u ko~uwapiŋ o~unini a "**" ko~u sakaira no~u pipaŋaŋan . taɬ~ɮamaan to~u sakikiwiko~u ko~u mama ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana, saka kakawaən papitiɾiɬ~ɮ i tajnan kawtəŋ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan itija maɾinaħ tajra i aɾisan ko~uko~u~umin kakko~u. iko~ur itira ʦiŋra i tajʦiw fo~uʦo~u~ukakko~u, i *** ɬ~ɮəmak itija, mikiħatija ʦiŋra to~u ** so~ufitaj i tajʦiw fo~uʦo~u~ukakko~u a "miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan", miɾijas tajra i po~uɾi. nika o~u piɾaɾaŋ no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ** so~ufitaj ʦi *ħo~uŋ jirən, ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana ato~u * kapo~ut mitiɾiɬ~ɮ a fafaħijan miɾijas to~u po~uɾi a mino~ukaj . ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan misawaɬ~ɮ ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana nai fo~uʦo~u~ukakko~u i, itira i ʦijai, aɾisan pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a maɾasiŋsi. i **** miħəʦa masawaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra to~u kaɾasiŋsi, o~u mamisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u saka tajraaw i ʦo~uɾo~umb~b~via ɬ~ɮajkako~u no~u amiɾika, nika maɾəkapo~ut ko~u mama ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana to~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a ɬ~ɮəmak a marəpət, patajan. karəpət ni ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana paɾimo~uʡo~ut a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan saka, sawaɬ~ɮ sato~u ʦiŋra to~u sakatajra i amiɾika mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, tajra to~u ʦiŋra i karo~umaɬ~ɮiwan ʦi pai nana ħan ko~u paŋaŋan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u sakiɾaɾo~umaʡan, misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ sapaʡo~urip to~u mama . o~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u ɾatiŋ ko~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan niŋra, nika ħo~uniħo~uni makiɾim no~u iməŋ a miso~uɾap, maɾiʦaj, saka əʦa to~u pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ɾiko~uɬ~ɮo~u, ano~u əʦa sakatatəɾəkaw to~u ɾiko~uɬ~ɮo~u a tijam. iko~ur no~u kapataj ni ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana i, matira to~u ko~u pikiɾim no~u iməŋ a miʦaɾap, marariɬ~ɮ maɾiʦaj, sakasaso~uwaɾ, pako~uko~utən ʦiŋra mikapo~utaj to~u ko~uŋʦantaŋ ħan i *** ɬ~ɮəmakan. itija sa i "sakaŋaʡaj miħajɬ~ɮa" t o~usifo~u ato~u ʦaɾəmʦəm to~u sakaɾattiħ a mako~uwaŋ mapataŋiʦ maɾapaɬ~ɮamso~uaj to~u ro~uma kitakit a tapaŋ paʡaɾipaj pataɬ~ɮo~u . mato~uʡas to~u ko~u safa to~u faʡinajan fafaħijan miisaɾ to~u sakiɾaɾo~umaʡan, ** ko~u miħəʦaan ni paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan itija to~u misawaɬ~ɮ ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ko~u tajaɾ, itira sa i tajpi mipatijam . ipipatijam mananam to~u ɾafaŋ ʦi sħi b~b~viŋjan, masasio~uɾaħ ʦaŋra, iko~ur mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u . i **** miħəʦa, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miso~uɾapaj miʦo~uwat to~u *iŋsħan ʦo~u~uanan, maso~uɾo~ut iħo~u ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana mapatataɾaw miħajɬ~ɮa to~u nano~u nikapo~utaj itija to~u "pəŋɾai minʦo~u~u jiəfaŋ to~uŋməŋħo~u~ui", maaɾa ko~u piħajɬ~ɮa a paja o~u aəʦa to~u ka so~uɾapən . kato~uʡasan kaɾitəŋan miħəʦa iko~ur no~u kapataj no~u faʡinaj ʦi sħi b~b~viŋjan i, kəriɬ~ɮən niŋra ko~u wawa nai tajpi mino~ukaj tajra i tapaŋ nijaro~uʡ. o~u mapo~uɬ~ɮətaj miɾiʡəpaħaj ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana, miɾijas to~u karo~umaɬ~ɮiwan maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj ko~u tajaɾ, ħaɾafin no~u faɾaʡan aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, iko~ur itira i nijaro~uʡ no~u mama a miɾijas to~u ħəkaɾ a mapataj . piħaratəŋan i **** miħəʦa, mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi sakai mitso~u~uko~u misaŋaʡaj to~u rajraj "kaʦiŋaŋan no~u tajwan" (ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ: ***********), aənəmaj tamɬ~ɮaw pakajni i saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ano~u əʦa ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a mafaɾiʦaj tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana ko~u ʦəʦaj ɬ~ɮəŋan fafaħijan miɾiʦajan . mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj to~u jəħo~u~uo~uɾəji ʦi sħo~un ro~u~usħian mananam ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan itija i, misatatas to~u ** miħəʦaan no~u jəħo~u~uo~uɾəji to~u pitərək, misjasiŋ ʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan, itija to~u i **** miħəʦa mipasaɬ~ɮak paika . i **** miħəʦa, maraɬ~ɮiwaj no~u ʡamis ʦi ʡiɾiɬ~ɮ kawɾo~u pakiʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw "faŋʦaɾaj fafaħijan" ʦəʦaj raɬ~ɮiw ; iko~ur to~u niŋra to~u ** miħəʦa maɾəkapo~ut to~u maraɬ~ɮiwaj no~u piwma finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦi ʦħən jo~uŋɾo~uŋ itira i takaŋ miraɬ~ɮiw i, o~unini a raɬ~ɮiw "faŋʦaɾaj fafaħijan" ato~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a raɬ~ɮiw pasiʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a mitaʡo~uŋ . i **** miħəʦa *** piħaratəŋan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, sħanɾiŋ jo~u~uəto~u~uan pasaɬ~ɮak "ħo~u~u*o~u~uo~usħan" a raɬ~ɮiw, miħaratəŋ ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən) aʦi paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋanaan, o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u niraɬ~ɮiwan saħəto~u piʦəɾiʡ mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən) ɾaɾo~umaʡan . ɾaɾo~umaʡan mamo~uʡətəp maɾikaka ʦa paiʦo~u~u jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana, o~u ʦəʦaj kaəmaŋan mapəsiʡ to~u. iko~ur no~u karəpət ni ʡo~u~uo~uŋ*ʡə jataʡo~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisən), ʦifo~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u wawa ʦiŋra ato~u amiɾika kakəriɬ~ɮan so~ufitaj, pakaʦi *ao~u jiŋħan, saɾo~uŋan i ** miħəʦa i mato~uɾo~uʡ a mapataj. iko~ur ʦiwawa to~u fafaħijan nano~u ɬ~ɮipŋ a wawa, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi sħi b~b~viŋjan, ira ko~u * faʡinajan ato~u * fafaħijan a wawa. o~u ʦəʦaj wawa ni sħi b~b~viŋjan mato~uɾo~uʡ a mapataj .
